Frequently asked questions

What are the best AI research agents for B2B?

Based on our index, the top AI research agents for B2B are ChatGPT Deep Research, Gemini Deep Research, Kompas AI. These are ranked by rating and capability depth across 4 indexed agents.

How do I choose an AI agent for B2B?

When evaluating AI research agents for B2B, consider pricing model (free vs subscription vs usage-based), deployment difficulty, integrations with your existing stack, and whether the agent specialises in B2B workflows. Every agent on this page includes structured data on all of these dimensions.

Are there free AI agents for B2B?

Yes — several AI research agents offer free or freemium plans. Use the filter pills above to narrow by pricing, or browse the full AI Research Agents index.
